title: Inflation Calculator - Purchasing Power Over Time
description: Free inflation calculator. See how inflation affects purchasing power over time. Calculate the future or past value of money adjusted for inflation.
keywords: inflation calculator, purchasing power calculator, inflation rate, cost of living calculator, money value over time
intro: Calculate how inflation affects the value of money over time. Enter an amount and time period to see its equivalent purchasing power.

faq.a: Inflation is the rate at which the general level of prices rises, reducing the purchasing power of money over time.

faq.q: What is a good inflation rate?
faq.a: Most central banks target around 2% annual inflation as healthy for economic growth. Higher rates erode savings faster.
If your savings earn less interest than the inflation rate, your money loses real purchasing power over time.
